message:
extension_dispatcher: HTTP and session hostcall dispatch handlers

New hostcall dispatch handlers for the extension dispatcher:

HTTP dispatch (dispatch_http):
- Wraps incoming payload in HostCallPayload with "http" capability
- Delegates to HttpConnector::dispatch
- Converts connector errors to HostcallOutcome::Error with appropriate codes
- Maps HostCallErrorCode variants to string codes (timeout, denied, io, etc.)

Session dispatch (dispatch_session):
- Mirrors the JsRuntimeHost session ops for consistency
- Supports: get_state, get_messages, get_entries, get_branch, get_file,
  get_name, set_name, append_entry, append_message
- Case-insensitive op matching (get_state == getState == GETSTATE)
- Returns HostcallOutcome::Success or Error with structured messages

Test infrastructure additions:
- TestSession: mock ExtensionSession with configurable state and name tracking
- spawn_http_server: minimal TCP server for HTTP dispatch integration tests
- Test: dispatcher_session_hostcall_resolves_state_and_set_name

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
